mapper.select: SELECT wb.amount AS amount, wb.end_date AS endDate, wb.reward_status AS rewardStatus, u.current_outfit_key AS currentOutfitKey, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(t.amount) FROM `transaction` t WHERE t.user_id = wb.user_id AND t.type = 2 AND t.`date` BETWEEN wb.start_date AND wb.end_date ), 0) AS spentMoney FROM weekly_budget wb JOIN `user` u ON u.id = wb.user_id WHERE wb.id = #{weeklyBudgetId} AND wb.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE weekly_budget SET reward_outfit_key = #{outfitKey}, reward_images_json = #{imagesJson}, reward_status = 'PENDING', reward_decided_at = NULL WHERE id = #{weeklyBudgetId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS weeklyBudgetId, user_id AS userId, reward_outfit_key AS rewardOutfitKey, reward_status AS rewardStatus, reward_images_json AS rewardImagesJson FROM weekly_budget WHERE id = #{weeklyBudgetId} AND user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id AS weeklyBudgetId, user_id AS userId, reward_outfit_key AS rewardOutfitKey, reward_status AS rewardStatus, reward_images_json AS rewardImagesJson FROM weekly_budget WHERE id = #{weeklyBudgetId} AND user_id = #{userId}
